title: Development of a Mobile Contraception Decision Aid for Transgender and Gender-Nonconforming Individuals Assigned Female at Birth
authors_full: Isabel Glass, MA; I-Wen Weng, BA; Pei-Yu Tsai, MS; Rushabh Jaiswal, MS; Kanishk Tanotra, MS; Erin K. Chiou, PhD; Jenny Brian, PhD; Dongwen Wang, PhD

summary.hook: This poster describes the development of a mobile contraception decision aid intended to support transgender and gender-nonconforming (TGNC) individuals assigned female at birth...
summary.summary_30s: This poster describes the development of a mobile contraception decision aid intended to support transgender and gender-nonconforming (TGNC) individuals assigned female at birth (AFAB) in selecting contraceptive options.

key_numbers: Exploring specific contraceptives with descriptions of each method, common myths, and FAQs; 2.
Personalized recommendations of contraceptives based on medical conditions and individual preferences (to discuss with...
takeaways: The brand style was redefined using simple, gender-neutral design languages and more visual elements to enhance accessibility.
New features outlined include a review/experience component about contraceptives and a TGNC AFAB support network component.
Development focus included improving system design by adding new features and enhancing existing functions; current work includes system functionality/usability testing...
